This POC will use the action `‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą` since it easily allows us to edit any review on Zomato.com. More severe options could be ‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą to read user info.
